summary: Executed backend API regression tests and frontend integration checks on the public preview URL. Core portfolio, projects filters/grouping, resume PDF, contact submission, studio save, and inbox linkage are working.
action_items: Optional code-quality follow-up: split /app/frontend/src/pages/studio-page.jsx (>700 lines) into smaller modules/components for maintainability.
critical_code_review_comments: studio-page.jsx is 748 lines; split into focused components/hooks per maintainability guideline.
seed_data_creation: Created test contact messages via POST /api/contact during integration tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL tested: https://neon-portfolio-137.preview.emergentagent.com. Pytest suite added under /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py and passed (4/4). Frontend flow validated for Home/Projects/Resume/Contact/Studio including contact-to-inbox flow.
rca of the issue: No product bug found. One initial Playwright selector failure was test-script-related (expected nested anchor under resume button). Correct selector to target [data-testid='resume-download-button'] directly resolved it.
